title: Eziglide 50-Pack Ballpoint Pen Set, Pink – Medium Nib (1.0mm) for Smooth Writing & Unique Tip – Ergonomic Grip, Long-Lasting Ink, Perfect for Home, School, Teachers, Work & Daily Handwriting
features: Ultimate Quality: EziGlide's unique pink biro pen tips are precisely engineered to ensure you enjoy the ultimate easy writing experience, great handwriting pens, exam pens or teacher pens set.
Ink Technology: EziGlide pink ink pens contain an advanced ink formula to provide you with an ultra-smooth writing sensation along with being quick drying to prevent smudging on the page.

Solid Colour Barrel: The EziGlide Pink Pen barrels match the colour of the ink within to help differentiate what is in your Pen Pot. A Pink ink pen is the perfect addition to your pink stationery set!
Safety : EziGLIDE's ventilated safety cap conforms to BS7272 standard, making them perfect for use in schools. The lid fits snuggly on the top to prevent misplacement while the biro pens in use.
Pink ball point pens multipack of 50 - Medium Point Nib (1.0mm) The Eziglide pens nib is fixed to ensure the pen can`t be taken to bits, designed with schools in mind to prevent fiddling!
